description: Power BI Frown-to-Fix knowledge base for generated expert-replacement artifacts.

patterns.rootCause: Two active filter paths connect the same fact and dimension grain.
patterns.fixStrategy: Remove fact-to-fact relationships, deactivate alternate paths, or route through conformed dimensions only.

patterns.rootCause: Power Query navigates source tables by numeric row index such as Source{6}.
patterns.fixStrategy: Use key-based navigation such as Source{[Item="Table", Kind="Sheet"]}[Data].

patterns.errorContains: not supported for DirectQuery connections to OLAP sources
patterns.rootCause: Model contains semantic edits that Power BI blocks for DirectQuery over OLAP sources.
patterns.fixStrategy: Move calculations to the source model or switch to an Import/composite design supported by the source.

patterns.rootCause: PBIR visual references a table column or measure that is not present in TMDL.
patterns.fixStrategy: Regenerate visuals from the semantic model inventory and rerun visual binding validation.

patterns.errorContains: column of the table wasn't found
patterns.rootCause: Source schema changed after model generation.
patterns.fixStrategy: Run source profiling, compare against schema_drift_contract.json, and update the source mapping.
